posts.title: How to Hire for the Microsoft Power Platform in a Talent-Short Market
posts.excerpt: Demand for Power Platform talent has never been higher - but the talent pool hasn't kept pace. Here's what the most successful organisations are doing differently to attract and hire the right people.

posts.title: Beyond the Pay Packet: What Really Motivates Microsoft Dynamics & Power Platform Professionals
posts.excerpt: Salary matters, but it rarely seals the deal. After years specialising in the Microsoft Dynamics 365 and Power Platform space, one thing is consistently clear - what really moves the needle is autonomy and growth.
